message:
docs: ft branding sweep in benchmarks + evidence

Replaces "wa" references with "ft" in benchmark results and
evidence documents from the FTUI phased rollout work:

- benchmarks/lua_removal_results.md: version string + binary name
- benchmarks/vendoring_roi_decision.md: crate name reference
- evidence/ftui-08.1/perf-baselines.md: binary name
- evidence/ftui-08.2/hotpath-analysis.md: crate reference
- evidence/ftui-08.3/compatibility-matrix.md: binary + crate names
- evidence/ftui-08.4/stability-report.md: binary name

No behavioral changes — text-only fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-5) wa watch stopped
+4) ft watch running
+5) ft watch stopped
